name: The White House
subject: Made in America Week
body:
The White House kicks off Made in America Week today
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbb4a127f473ad982a62ec1291bd812526303995bb3f97be2f64caf507402159ab434e915a3a2ebaed39d2932f48517e6a) Today, President Trump's Administration is showcasing companies and products from around the country at the White House to kick off Made in America week. All 50 states will be represented at the White House, and President Trump will deliver a message reaffirming his support for the American worker.
# Today's Events
**12:30 PM** President Trump has lunch with Vice President Mike Pence**1:30 PM** President Trump meets with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson**2:00 PM** Press Briefing with Press Secretary Sean Spicer**3:00 PM** President Trump and Vice President Pence participate in a Made in America product showcase - [Watch](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb2cc074d6b76bf83037e41cf16693f4951cf6460507c2f044130d57ed2535e4c729f104dca3185225f140e47119a58a61)**4:30 PM** Vice President Pence participates in a bilateral meeting with President Aleksandar Vucic of Serbia**8:40 PM** Vice President Pence delivers the keynote address at the Christians United for Israel Washington Summit
# Photo of the Day
**French National Day Parade** | July 14, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)
# OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY
**FACT:** 22 Ohio counties are currently projected to have [no coverage options next year](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb41477fb13088681233be555e1205ca2a682d10ef173386e1f73dd77f44ec6b2404f27e2f9b52f237d4e450e7be37ff37) and another 28 counties may have no choices. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb41477fb13088681233be555e1205ca2a682d10ef173386e1f73dd77f44ec6b2404f27e2f9b52f237d4e450e7be37ff37)
# WHITE HOUSE UPDATES
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb351d5fcd608ff8751957a180d1e3b825a240b286c2a49db2a40934eb5f1e68669275f01cdc58047d11e07f2ef04a6b9c)**On Friday, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump spent their second day in Paris,** France participating as guests of honor in the annual [Bastille Day ceremonies.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbf97db99033c71977b17a8b40d9683489a444950a32ec379e08f13a5951e1e158e4887840ab5da67bd52ca1e5fd16fa76)[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbd719f91f617d323db3acdd78ac762a7a0d190a76413dadde94f89c3a0fdaba773d11ac956c20c4cc1e9734ad993bb066)[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbd06aa04c14fdd84ae03376910808a6725e5f9433297180366d2abc2d05b32f7b30c774ebf14ba976820fcf5afa082525)**Watch President Trump's**[Weekly Address](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb1dbafbbeb994f96b2f2ae282f5f5bed78dbf0afdfee1bdc89ebd7b42dd794f2b3db210ab130ecd0d5fd9592a90773771) to the Nation. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb7f1678a0e025a001177df377b2c5cf134f23c2b7deff3f89aeb29d3b07626fb95b957898cd8424e7a3c8f4a403776f92)**President Trump announced his third wave of United States Attorney candidates.** These candidates [share the President’s vision](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbd686f700bbd87457a2c52b1e4c8ec14db2d89ee97aafaeea5087a50b6e1a8052ad39f387f2a27a682420fe6d7bdf6fd1) for “Making America Safe Again.” [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbb7b1dfe9a1dfeea6eea1c96b1ee3011851417aefe67dd67b097900944b1b66604af2afb8aca11ba4b025b1226e622454)**The Trump Administration recently announced that the number of health insurance issuers** that initially filed to sell Obamacare plans in 2018 is [only about half as many](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb7a13e114b54e014f17bd413f1e57ebe305107b01f6f2a139a4c21794971faf26207c0ce9dec680da8b00359b85bacbc2) as the number that originally wanted to participate in 2016. **Intern Series:[Vox Populi,](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb244b3ea6040a72ae0b0ce37c2e007ebc629b6ddcc8a1f094a7d0e008a4828bcba6a1f30e4ba948eaa5cb9ffec4ca49d5)** "After I was accepted into the Summer 2017 White House Internship Program, I have to confess, I binge-watched the first season of the West Wing to try to prepare myself for the experience..."
# West Wing Reads
Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. **[Sign up](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbe91e161bf45bc2accfa1d6c9dbfb70eb04df231a0a6e21151fd5e8444a7712bb46add8d985c32f74ca83d34045a41b37) to receive this daily update from the West Wing.**[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecbe91e161bf45bc2accfa1d6c9dbfb70eb04df231a0a6e21151fd5e8444a7712bb46add8d985c32f74ca83d34045a41b37)
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb60e162d2f3b04bfc7eb7e74e7acb524494402190ac8ab5139fdfdd639cffc49ea8f683e7bf270c3b7a5d198e8b548a4a) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bae52e6308a91ecb159020a3fd770debe7d6741097a5267ce67bf73ea04200c62452934285678b3978a59fc872e6a256fe871bcbf564da97) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48c0d0e1ba88a2689f251bbf40ebdec043c066334d22abcdc06328a501e18efe0c6be36e640d503656fabc252b50efce1)
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: Keep putting pressure on the GOP - add your name, Derek
body:
Stand up to help us save affordable care.
---
**Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd")**
I like winning, Derek. Whether it's putting Democrats in office or passing legislation that makes a positive difference in people's lives, it just feels good to win. I'm not ashamed to admit it.

But when it comes to health care, there's so much more at stake than just chalking up another political victory. Millions of Americans are relying on us to win -- lives hang in the balance. **[So I need you to say you'll stay in this fight until we defeat the GOP's health care repeal once and for all.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+I+need+you+to+say+youll+stay+in+this+&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd")**

It's keeping me up at night that we might be on the verge of going back to a time when a child with cancer could hit a lifetime cap on coverage at four years-old, when insurers could throw you off your coverage because you were sick and would need care the most, or when simply being a woman meant you would face thousands more dollars in medical bills.

Grassroots Democrats all over the country have dug in our heels and fought back, and the fact that this bill hasn't come up for a vote yet proves that our resistance is working.

But Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have made it clear that they'll do whatever it takes to be able to say they repealed Obamacare -- regardless of the real, human cost.

**We can't let up. We need to stay committed to fighting repeal until we win. Sign on and say you are -- there's too much on the line for any of us to back down now:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd")**
Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232fc/4067b0a/306d77d44/7e6a91fc/1847671029/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232fc/4067b0a/306d77d44/7e6a91fd/1847671029/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232fc/4067b0a/306d77d44/7e6a91fa/1847671029/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232fc/4067b0a/306d77d44/7e6a91fb/1847671029/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170717_joc_nd&source=em_20170717_joc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Stand up to help us save affordable care. Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal. "" I like winning, Derek. Whether it's putting Democrats in office or passing legislation that makes a positive difference in people's lives, it just feels good to win. I'm not ashamed to admit it. But when it comes to health care, there's so much more at stake than just chalking up another political victory. Millions of Americans are relying on us to win -- lives hang in the balance. "" It's keeping me up at night that we might be on the verge of going back to a time when a child with cancer could hit a lifetime cap on coverage at four years-old, when insurers could throw you off your coverage because you were sick and would need care the most, or when simply being a woman meant you would face thousands more dollars in medical bills. Grassroots Democrats all over the country have dug in our heels and fought back, and the fact that this bill hasn't come up for a vote yet proves that our resistance is working. But Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have made it clear that they'll do whatever it takes to be able to say they repealed Obamacare -- regardless of the real, human cost. We can't let up. We need to stay committed to fighting repeal until we win. Sign on and say you are -- there's too much on the line for any of us to back down now: "" Thanks, Jess Jess O'Connell Chief Executive Officer Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Katie
subject: Quick favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
****

We need a favor, Friend.

With so many distractions out there, we're worried House Republicans' work to make people's lives better isn't getting through.

That's why we're asking you to forward this email to **5 of your friends as soon as you can.**[_And we 'll send you a sticker as a thank you!_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=Mjk4MDAxOTcS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjE0MTYwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)__

**The news doesn 't always cover our work, so we need you and your fellow conservatives to help us spread the word that we are making real progress on the agenda you voted for in 2016.**

Here's what we've done:
* Repealed Obamacare.
* Rolled back Obama-era regulations.
* Doubled down on penalties for illegal immigrants and cracked down on sanctuary cities.
* Increased funding for national security and defense.
* Protected veterans by holding the VA accountable.

Here's what we're working on:
* Tax reform.
* Passing a conservative budget.
* Replacing Obamacare.

**We 're coming to you for help because Republicans won in 2016 by going directly to the people. We didn't have the media helping us then and we don't need them now -- so long as we have you. [Don't forget -- as a thank you, we want to send you a STICKER.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=Mjk4MDAxOTcS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjE0MTYwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks for helping out!

Katie
Team Ryan

| [Get your sticker >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=Mjk4MDAxOTcS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjE0MTYwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=29800197&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjE0MTYwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

Here's what we've done: Repealed Obamacare. Rolled back Obama-era regulations. Doubled down on penalties for illegal immigrants and cracked down on sanctuary cities. Increased funding for national security and defense. Protected veterans by holding the VA accountable. Here's what we're working on: Tax reform. Passing a conservative budget. Replacing Obamacare. name: Johanna Cervone, FlaDems.com
subject: we can be next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend -- Nationwide, local Democrats are scoring some big wins.

Recently, during two state legislative special elections in OKLAHOMA, Democratic candidates _crushed_ their Republican opponents.

Two historically BRIGHT red districts elected a Democrat for the first time in years. Florida Democrats can do the same in our own legislative elections.

**This September, let 's flip state Senate District 40 from red to blue - and send our own message to Rick Scott and Donald Trump: that Democrats aren't standing for their right-wing bigotry.**

[**There is a LOT at stake, friends. Can you click here and donate $5 before our mid-month deadline?**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+There+is+a+LOT+at+stake+FIRSTNAMEfriends&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

**************[Donate $10 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd4a/1a5213b3/7772de9d/718b9721/2792114809/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1")****** ******[Donate $25 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd4a/1a5213b3/7772de9d/718b9720/2792114809/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1")******

******[Donate $50 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd4a/1a5213b3/7772de9d/718b9723/2792114809/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1")******

**********[Donate $100 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd4a/1a5213b3/7772de9d/718b9722/2792114809/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1")******

******[Other amount](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+Other+amount&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1")****** Flipping another seat in Florida is a real possibility. Democrats can't afford to give an inch.

We'd be replacing a disgraced Republican who was one of Rick Scott and Donald Trump's top allies.

That's why we're going all out over the next 10 weeks, expanding our winning ground game across this key district.

[**That 's why we're asking you to step up right now. The special election results from Oklahoma are clear. With grassroots energy, engagement, and a powerful message, Democrats can win, even in districts Republicans take for granted.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+asking+you+to+s&utm_campaign=em071717_1&source=em071717_1&refcode=em071717_1")

\-- Johanna

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. name: Survey (via NRCC)
subject: We need your opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need your opinion, Peter.

We've already had almost 68,000 conservatives in your area share their thoughts on what should be the #1 priority for Congress, but we still need **your** answer in order to get an accurate representation.
**House Priorities Survey**
**ID:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click1.action.gop.com/dhrldkpbmngfckckfrwrpfzpszfbssrwlhcrhtzthcchcj_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)**
**Survey Completion:** O%
[**Access Survey Here**](http://click1.action.gop.com/unfzpbqjfdysnbnbsgkgqsvqmvsjmmgkzwngwhvhwnnwfy_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)
Your participation in this short survey is crucial in helping to protect our majority from the radical left.

**That 's why we want to reward you for your service to our Party when you are finished. **

Please take a moment to help us make a real impact on this election by completing this short survey: **[Access Survey Now>>>](http://click1.action.gop.com/ljwfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgjjgnm_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)**

Thank you,

House Republicans

[**ACCESS SURVEY HERE**](http://click1.action.gop.com/kvfbdkhzsgtjvkvkjrqrhjwhfwjzffrqbmvrmlwlmvvmsh_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)
Prefer to donate by mail? [Visit here.](http://click1.action.gop.com/xrcnjlvybmgtrlrltpqpvtkvsktysspqnhrphdkdhrrhbh_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605) Contributions to the NRCC are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://click1.action.gop.com/vgrqjbvcgtrnhbhbnkzkvndvmdncmmkzqphkpfdfphhpgk_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)
NRCC
320 First St SE
Washington, DC 20003

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is the only committee exclusively devoted to increasing the Republican majority in the U.S. House of Representatives, but we cannot do it without your support. If you would like to donate, please visit our website [here.](http://click1.action.gop.com/hwvlhrqdwgnzcrcrzspsqzjqmjzdmmsplbcsbvjvbccbwc_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605) If you instead prefer to donate by mail, please visit [here.](http://click1.action.gop.com/lnkfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgjjgnn_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)
Thank you for all your support in helping us increase the Republican majority in Congress.

P.S. be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://click1.action.gop.com/ygqpbrlwgzmnkrkrnftflnylcynwccftpqkfqsysqkkqgb_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605) and [Twitter.](http://click1.action.gop.com/jmtzqhrpmdswvhvhwtktrwcrfcwpfftkzjvtjbcbjvvjmf_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605) If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints or feedback please send us your ideas [here](mailto:info@nrccvictory.com) or by replying to this email.

[Privacy Policy](http://click1.action.gop.com/olwcrgzplvfdwgwgdknkzdszmsdpmmkncjwkjtstjwwjlq_pcqhccdllfm.html?a=17786605)

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Peter, we appreciate you (free bumper sticker!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|

| | Peter,

Whether you've been with Joe since his days as school board president for Mishawaka Marian High School or are standing with him for the very first time this year, we're glad to have you with us. To thank you for your support of all the work Joe's doing to fight for Hoosiers in the Senate, we want you to be among the first to have **your very own Joe Donnelly bumper sticker -- for FREE.**

name: staff@fladems.com
subject: Johanna's message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Did you see Johanna's note? We have a big chance to flip a seat from red to blue in September -- [**can you help us score a major win?**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+can+you+help+us+score+a+major+win&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")

**Begin original message:**

Friend -- Nationwide, local Democrats are scoring some big wins.

Recently, during two state legislative special elections in OKLAHOMA, Democratic candidates _crushed_ their Republican opponents.

Two historically BRIGHT red districts elected a Democrat for the first time in years. Florida Democrats can do the same in our own legislative elections.

**This September, let 's flip state Senate District 40 from red to blue - and send our own message to Rick Scott and Donald Trump: that Democrats aren't standing for their right-wing bigotry.**

[**There is a LOT at stake, friends. Can you click here and donate $5 before our mid-month deadline?**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+There+is+a+LOT+at+stake+FIRSTNAMEfriends&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

**************[Donate $10 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd49/1a5213b3/77053d6b/718b974b/2432301383/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")****** ******[Donate $25 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd49/1a5213b3/77053d6b/718b974a/2432301383/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")******

******[Donate $50 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd49/1a5213b3/77053d6b/718b9745/2432301383/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")******

**********[Donate $100 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd49/1a5213b3/77053d6b/718b9744/2432301383/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")******

******[Other amount](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Other+amount&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")****** Flipping another seat in Florida is a real possibility. Democrats can't afford to give an inch.

We'd be replacing a disgraced Republican who was one of Rick Scott and Donald Trump's top allies.

That's why we're going all out over the next 10 weeks, expanding our winning ground game across this key district.

[**That 's why we're asking you to step up right now. The special election results from Oklahoma are clear. With grassroots energy, engagement, and a powerful message, Democrats can win, even in districts Republicans take for granted.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=8+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+asking+you+to+s&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2")

\-- Johanna

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd49/1a5213b3/77053d6b/718b9741/2432301383/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em071717_2&source=em071717_2&refcode=em071717_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Did You See? (via DSCC)
subject: A message from Joe Biden (health care):
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Vice-President Biden just published a powerful call to action on health care, team. Check it out -- then please, answer his call:
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113cee/597153015/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare?source=PT-20170717-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113cee/597153015/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare?source=PT-20170717-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113cee/597153015/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare?source=PT-20170717-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113cee/597153015/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare?source=PT-20170717-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

**A quick note on contributions, team:**

The fight ahead on health care is going to be a tough one. And Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against all of Trump's reckless proposals. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170717-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113ce8/597153015/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113ceb/597153015/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbc0/2b07114c/3da50009/73113cea/597153015/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Your right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef1/2a380d31/196efca8/fe46fc/526377374/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef1/2a380d31/196efca8/fe46fc/526377374/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Our government is founded on the idea that everyone deserves a voice.
For decades, Americans have fought, marched, and spoken up for the idea that all citizens should have a say in our government. Simply put, the right to vote is at the center of our democracy.
But now, without a shred of evidence of widespread voter fraud, Donald Trump has created a "Commission on Election Integrity."
**Let 's be clear here: this is nothing but a shallow attempt to suppress voters, specifically low income voters, the elderly, those who experience disabilities, and people of color.**
[**We can 't let Trump get away with a nationwide campaign of voter suppression. Add your name to tell Republicans: Stop attacking voting rights!**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef1/2a380d31/196efca8/fe46fd/526377374/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectthevote/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_votingrightsja")
Thank you for standing up for the fundamental right to vote.
-- Team Maggie

clean_body: "" "" Hello, Our government is founded on the idea that everyone deserves a voice. For decades, Americans have fought, marched, and spoken up for the idea that all citizens should have a say in our government. Simply put, the right to vote is at the center of our democracy. But now, without a shred of evidence of widespread voter fraud, Donald Trump has created a "Commission on Election Integrity." Let 's be clear here: this is nothing but a shallow attempt to suppress voters, specifically low income voters, the elderly, those who experience disabilities, and people of color. "" Thank you for standing up for the fundamental right to vote. -- Team Maggie ""
